title: MinehopLite
description: Source Engine Movement and Bhopping in Minecraft for a Better Parkour Experience
body:
### This mod completely overrides the default Minecraft movement (including ladders) and replaces it with an attempt at copying the strafing mechanics from Counter Strike: Source. ### This version has no other features other than the movement. The main version implements many "essential" features for creating bhop maps and managing a bhop server, you can find it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/minehop). ### In the main version there's an official server preloaded into your multiplayer tab with some maps. Please also join the discord: [https://discord.gg/hMs97RHEgF](https://discord.gg/hMs97RHEgF) Licensing Info:
Spoiler The bhop code is a heavily modified version of the code from the BHops mod by SmolMallow on curseforge. You can find the original logic in the LivingEntityMixin class. The code for the speedometer is also taken directly from the mod Squeedometer by squeek502 on curseforge. Please note that BHops uses a MIT license which leaves us free to distribute their code in our own software, and Squeedometer is unlicensed with their own terms that state: "Anyone is free to copy, modify, publish, use, compile, sell, or distribute this software, either in source code form or as a compiled binary, for any purpose, commercial or non-commercial, and by any means."
### The Fabric version **requires** Cloth Config API, Fabric API. I recommend downloading Mod Menu so you can easily configure the settings. ### The Forge version has no requirements however currently does not have the speedometer, SSJ, and efficiency hud.

Here is a list of all the features in the mod:
  • Overrides vanilla movement to be much closer to Counter Strike: Source.
  • Fully configurable settings for the movement logic. (Configs are serverside)
  • Toggleable HUD for showing your SSJ, strafe efficiency, and speed.
